cases.prompt: 스프린트 모드로 3가지 방안 비교하고 best case 추천해줘

assertions.text: Produces a 3-case analysis: Conservative, Balanced, and Aggressive.
Recommends a Best case using weighted criteria (Impact/Feasibility/Speed/Risk).
Offers an iterative refinement loop with a user-agreed iteration depth.

cases.prompt: Compare options for this decision and iterate on the best case.

assertions.text: Generates a sprint report with a 3-case comparison table and a recommendation with rationale.
Confirms iteration depth with the user to avoid an infinite refinement loop.
